name: tinkerquarry
description: Local-first AI CAD workflow for printable objects

scripts.test:ui:coverage: cd apps/ui && pnpm test:coverage -- --runInBand src/hooks/__tests__/useAiAgent.test.tsx src/hooks/__tests__/useOpenScad.test.tsx src/services/__tests__/renderService.test.ts src/platform/__tests__/index.test.tsx src/stores/__tests__/apiKeyStore.test.tsx
scripts.test:web:coverage: cd apps/web && pnpm test:coverage -- --runInBand functions/_lib/__tests__/share.test.ts functions/api/__tests__/share.test.ts functions/s/__tests__/shareMeta.test.ts
scripts.test:scripts: node -e "console.log('No standalone script unit tests are currently defined; use test:gate for release validation.')"
scripts.test:gate: pnpm -r lint && pnpm -r type-check && cd apps/ui && node --experimental-vm-modules --no-warnings node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js --runInBand && cd ../.. && pnpm test:web:unit && cd packages/engine && .venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pytest -q && cd ../.. && pnpm test:e2e:web
scripts.test:release: pnpm test:gate && scripts\native-release.cmd && pnpm test:e2e:tauri && pnpm test:e2e:tauri:installed
scripts.validate:changes: pnpm -r lint && pnpm -r type-check && pnpm test:scripts
